title: Làm Quen
description: Vân and Thơ are exchanging information about their names, nationalities, and jobs.

title: Thói Quen
description: Nam and Hương are asking each other about their daily routines, jobs, and habits.

title: Sở thích
description: Two friends are discussing their weekends, habits, and preferences.

title: Giờ và Phút
description: Việt and Hồng are asking about their near-future plans.

title: Em sinh ngày…
description: Two people are asking about Mai's and their dates of birth — and one of their birthdays is coming up soon!

title: Gọi món
description: Two friends are trying to order food and drinks in a Vietnamese eatery.

title: Mua sắm
description: Two friends chat about clothes they just bought and their recent trips to Korea and Thailand.

title: Đi siêu thị
description: A man is doing groceries in a supermarket and he's having trouble finding certain things.
